title: calamagrostis australis
intro: Calamagrostis australis, also known as tufted hair grass or black needle grass, is a species of grass native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Calamagrostis australis include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
